title: Jamaican Mozzarella Casserole
description: A twist on a classic casserole, this Jamaican Mozzarella Casserole combines the flavors of the Caribbean with the comfort of a cheesy, gooey casserole. Perfect for a dinner that's sure to please.

ingredients.name: garlicky Garlic
ingredients.notes: Use a press for best results

instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, sauté garlic and onion until softened.
Add diced tomatoes, jerk seasoning, and jalapeño. Simmer for 5 minutes.
In a large mixing bowl, combine cooked pasta, tomato mixture, and shredded mozzarella.
Transfer mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
